
```{ojs}
makeDumbbell = function({ inputData }) {

  const points = vl
    .markPoint({
      size: 120,
      opacity: 1,
      shape: "square",
      stroke: "transparent",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: width > 600 ? "Bruttopension" : null,
          labels:  width > 600 ? true : false,
          ticks:  width > 600 ? true : false,
          domain: true,
          grid: false,
          domainColor: "black",
          tickColor: "black",
          domainWidth: 0.75,
          tickWidth: 0.75,
          labelFlush: false,
          tickMinStep: 1000,
        })
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 5000],
          nice: false,
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          labels: false,
          ticks: false,
          // minExtent: 80,
        })
        .scale({
          reverse: true,
        }),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors2,
        })
        .legend(null),
        // .legend({
        //   // orient: width > 825 ? "right" : "top",
        //   orient: "top",
        //   symbolOpacity: 1,
        //   symbolType: "square",
        //   title: null,
        // }),
    )

  const lines = vl
    .markLine({
      opacity: 0.15,
      size: 5,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("D")
        .scale({
          range: ["black", "black"]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      size: 14,
      dy: 20,
      clip: true,
      align: "center",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: ["black"],
        }) 
        .legend(null),
      vl.text() 
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(",.0f"), 
    )
    
  const textPerc = vl
    .markText({
      size: 13,
      dx: 50,
      dy: -14,
      align: "right",
      anchor: "middle",
      clip: true,
      opacity: 0.51,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.joinaggregate([vl.mean("value").as("midValue")])
        .groupby(["D"]),
      vl.filter("datum.gesl == 'Frauen'")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("midValue"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("gapPerc")
        .format(",.0~%"),
    )

  const textGap = vl
    .markText({
      size: 13,
      dx: 50,
      dy: -30,
      align: "right",
      anchor: "middle",
      clip: true,
      opacity: 0.51,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.joinaggregate([vl.mean("value").as("midValue")])
        .groupby(["D"]),
      vl.filter("datum.gesl == 'Frauen'")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("midValue"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("gapValue")
        .format("$,.0~f"),
    )

  const textArrow = vl
    .markText({
      size: 13,
      dx: -50,
      dy: -30, // rangeRaw < 3000 ? -35 : -40,
      align: "left",
      anchor: "middle",
      clip: true,
      opacity: 0.51,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.joinaggregate([vl.mean("value").as("midValue")])
        .groupby(["D"]),
      vl.filter("datum.gesl == 'Frauen'")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("midValue"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.text()
        .value(["Gender", "Gap ↷"]),
    )

  const textMedianLabel = vl
    .markText({
      size: 13,
      dx: -14,
      align: "right",
      opacity: 0.51,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.D == 'Median' && datum.gesl == 'Frauen'")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.text()
        .value("Median"),
    )

  const textPerzentilLabel = vl
    .markText({
      size: 13,
      dx: -14,
      align: "right",
      opacity: 0.51,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.D != 'Median' && datum.gesl == 'Frauen'")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.text()
        .value("Perzentil"),
    )

    const layers = width > 600 ?
      vl.layer(
        lines,
        points,
        text,
        //textRel,
        textGap,
        textPerc,
        textArrow,
        textMedianLabel,
        textPerzentilLabel,
      ) :
      vl.layer(
        lines,
        points,
        //textRel,
        textGap,
        textPerc,
        textArrow,
        textMedianLabel,
        textPerzentilLabel,
        // text,
      )

  return layers
    .height(width > 600 ? 140 : 140)
    .width(makeWidth(width))
    // .facet({
    //   field: "D", 
    //   type: "nominal", 
    //   title: null,
    //   header: { 
    //     labelFontSize: 14, 
    //     labelOrient: "top",
    //   },
    // })
    .data(inputData)
    .config(config)

}
```
